  • Uses of ShootingStrategy in com.example.battleship.model.player

    Classes in com.example.battleship.model.player that implement ShootingStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HuntShootingStrategy
    A smarter alternative to RandomShootingStrategy: while there is no damaged-but-not-yet-sunk ship on the board, it behaves exactly like plain random targeting.
    class 
    RandomShootingStrategy
    Picks a uniformly random cell, among the ones not shot at yet, on every call -- the machine-player behavior required by HU-4.
